originalTitle: Yôkoso jitsuryoku shijô shugi no kyôshitsu e

episodes.primaryTitle: What Is Evil? Whatever Springs from Weakness.
episodes.originalTitle: What Is Evil? Whatever Springs from Weakness.

episodes.primaryTitle: It Takes a Great Talent and Skill to Conceal One's Talent and Skill.
episodes.originalTitle: It Takes a Great Talent and Skill to Conceal One's Talent and Skill.

episodes.primaryTitle: Man Is an Animal That Makes Bargains: No Other Animal Does This - No Dog Exchanges Bones with Another.
episodes.originalTitle: Man Is an Animal That Makes Bargains: No Other Animal Does This - No Dog Exchanges Bones with Another.

episodes.primaryTitle: We Should Not Be Upset That Others Hide the Truth from Us, When We Hide It So Often from Ourselves.
episodes.originalTitle: We Should Not Be Upset That Others Hide the Truth from Us, When We Hide It So Often from Ourselves.

episodes.primaryTitle: Hell Is Other People.
episodes.originalTitle: Hell Is Other People.

episodes.primaryTitle: There Are Two Kinds of Lies; One Concerns an Accomplished Fact, the Other Concerns a Future Duty.
episodes.originalTitle: There Are Two Kinds of Lies; One Concerns an Accomplished Fact, the Other Concerns a Future Duty.

episodes.primaryTitle: Nothing Is as Dangerous as an Ignorant Friend; a Wise Enemy Is to Be Preferred.
episodes.originalTitle: Nothing Is as Dangerous as an Ignorant Friend; a Wise Enemy Is to Be Preferred.

episodes.primaryTitle: Abandon All Hope, Ye Who Enter Here.
episodes.originalTitle: Abandon All Hope, Ye Who Enter Here.

episodes.primaryTitle: Man Is Condemned to Be Free.
episodes.originalTitle: Man Is Condemned to Be Free.

episodes.primaryTitle: Every Man Has in Himself the Most Dangerous Traitor of All.
episodes.originalTitle: Every Man Has in Himself the Most Dangerous Traitor of All.

episodes.primaryTitle: What People Commonly Call Fate is Mostly Their Own Stupidity.
episodes.originalTitle: What People Commonly Call Fate is Mostly Their Own Stupidity.

episodes.primaryTitle: Genius Lives Only One Story Above Madness.
episodes.originalTitle: Genius Lives Only One Story Above Madness.

episodes.primaryTitle: Remember to keep a clear head in difficult times.
episodes.originalTitle: Remember to keep a clear head in difficult times.

episodes.primaryTitle: There Are Two Main Human Sins from Which All the Others Derive: Impatience and Indolence
episodes.originalTitle: There Are Two Main Human Sins from Which All the Others Derive: Impatience and Indolence

episodes.primaryTitle: The Greatest Souls Are Capable of the Greatest Vices as Well as of the Greatest Virtues
episodes.originalTitle: The Greatest Souls Are Capable of the Greatest Vices as Well as of the Greatest Virtues

episodes.primaryTitle: The Material has to be Created
episodes.originalTitle: The Material has to be Created

episodes.primaryTitle: Every Failure Is a Step to Success.
episodes.originalTitle: Every Failure Is a Step to Success.

episodes.primaryTitle: Adversity Is the First Path to Truth.
episodes.originalTitle: Adversity Is the First Path to Truth.

episodes.primaryTitle: To doubt everything or to believe everything are two equally convenient solutions, both dispense with the necessity of reflection.
episodes.originalTitle: To doubt everything or to believe everything are two equally convenient solutions, both dispense with the necessity of reflection.

episodes.primaryTitle: The wound is at her heart.
episodes.originalTitle: The wound is at her heart.

episodes.primaryTitle: If you make a mistake and do not correct it, this is called a mistake.
episodes.originalTitle: If you make a mistake and do not correct it, this is called a mistake.

episodes.primaryTitle: People, often deceived by an illusive good, desire their own ruin
episodes.originalTitle: People, often deceived by an illusive good, desire their own ruin

episodes.primaryTitle: A man who cannot command himself will always be a slave
episodes.originalTitle: A man who cannot command himself will always be a slave

episodes.primaryTitle: Force without wisdom falls of its own weight
episodes.originalTitle: Force without wisdom falls of its own weight

episodes.primaryTitle: The worst enemy you can meet will always be yourself
episodes.originalTitle: The worst enemy you can meet will always be yourself

episodes.primaryTitle: The strongest principle of growth lies in the human choice.
episodes.originalTitle: The strongest principle of growth lies in the human choice.

episodes.primaryTitle: Man is wolf to man.
episodes.originalTitle: Man is wolf to man.
